title: Canada’s New Route to Citizenship Has Thousands of Americans Lining Up to Apply
summary_full: Canada has opened a route to citizenship for people who can prove they have a Canada-born ancestor. Millions could qualify, and Americans are already lining up to apply.
summary_public: Canada has opened a route to citizenship for people who can prove they have a Canada-born ancestor. Millions could qualify, and Americans are already lining up to apply.
